title: Wire React frontend to new backend canister endpoints

requirements.text: Add React Query hooks in frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts for the new e-commerce backend endpoints exposed by backend/main.mo: createVendor, getMyVendor, getVendorById, createProduct, updateProduct, listProducts, listProductsByVendor, createOrder, getOrder, updateOrderStatus, listMyOrders, listOrdersByVendor, creditVendor (admin-only), getMyVendorBalance, and withdrawVendorBalance.

quotes: start wiring the frontend to these new backend endpoints next

acceptanceCriteria: useQueries.ts exports query/mutation hooks for each listed backend method, using the existing useActor() pattern.
Mutations invalidate the correct cached queries (e.g., product lists after create/update; order lists after create/status update; vendor balance after withdraw/credit).
Hooks are disabled when the actor is unavailable, consistent with existing hooks in useQueries.ts.

requirements.text: Create or update frontend pages/components to use the new e-commerce hooks so the UI no longer relies on mock/local-only data for shopping, orders, and vendor flows: product browsing uses listProducts/listProductsByVendor, vendor onboarding/dashboard uses createVendor/getMyVendor/getMyVendorBalance/withdrawVendorBalance, and order history/detail uses listMyOrders/getOrder (and listOrdersByVendor/updateOrderStatus for vendor owners/admin as applicable).

quotes: start wiring the frontend to these new backend endpoints next

acceptanceCriteria: A signed-in user can create a vendor profile via createVendor and then see it via getMyVendor without a page refresh.
Product browsing renders data returned from listProducts (and listProductsByVendor when filtered by vendor).
Checkout/order placement calls createOrder and the resulting order appears in the buyer’s order list via listMyOrders.
Order detail pages (or dialogs) fetch fresh data via getOrder rather than relying on previously passed state.
Vendor order management (if present) loads via listOrdersByVendor and updates via updateOrderStatus with UI feedback for success/failure.

requirements.text: Fix user-facing pages that currently call the admin-only analytics endpoint getAllAnalytics so non-admin users do not trigger backend authorization traps; only admins should call useGetAllAnalytics, and non-admin experiences should gracefully render with empty/limited analytics data.

quotes: start wiring the frontend to these new backend endpoints next

acceptanceCriteria: MarketplacePage and DiscoveryHubPage do not invoke getAllAnalytics for non-admin users (no unauthorized errors in console/network).
RecommendationsPanel continues to render for non-admins; if analytics is unavailable, it uses safe defaults (e.g., zeros) without crashing.
AdminPanel continues to use getAllAnalytics and displays analytics normally for admins.

constraints: Do not edit files under frontend/src/components/ui (compose them as-is).
Do not modify immutable hook files: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.tsx, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx.
Backend must remain a single Motoko actor; do not introduce additional backend services.
nonGoals: Do not change backend authorization rules or add new backend endpoints as part of this request.
Do not address Stripe session/status keying, Stripe allowedCountries encoding, or long-term stable storage persistence unless explicitly requested later.
Do not redesign the overall IA/UX beyond what is required to connect existing UI to the new endpoints.
